narrative:
Precinct Norwalk 2-A (precinct in Huron County) has 941 registered voters, with 49.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.8 percentage points.
